contract_claim: The document states the setup file 'Deletes process.env.CONSOLE_OUTPUT_SILENCED' but the shadow doc says it is deleted from process.env at module load time (L40). The doc says this is step 2 in the setup file, but it's actually a module-level operation, not part of beforeAll/afterEach hooks.
observed_behavior: CONSOLE_OUTPUT_SILENCED: Deleted from process.env at module load (L40) to ensure console is active unless tests re-set it.
